revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]新しいページ: 「{{神社 |名称= 轟神社 |画像= |所在地= [[徳島県]][[阿南市]][[新野町]]北宮の久保4 |位置= |祭神= シナツヒコ|級長津比…」
revision.text:
{{神社 |名称= 轟神社 |画像= |所在地= [[徳島県]][[阿南市]][[新野町]]北宮の久保4 |位置= |祭神= [[シナツヒコ|級長津比古命]]
級長津比女 |社格= |創建= [[814年]]（[[弘仁]]元年） |本殿= |別名= |例祭= |神事= |}} '''轟神社'''（とどろきじんじゃ）は、[[徳島県]][[阿南市]][[新野町]]にある[[神社]]である。 == 歴史 == [[814年]]（[[弘仁]]元年）に[[大和国]]の[[龍田神社]]の分霊を勧請して創建したと伝わる。祭神は龍田風神と呼ばれ、農家や航海業者の信仰が厚い神である{{cite web|url=https://www.city.anan.tokushima.jp/docs/2010120800440/|title=轟神社|publisher=阿南市|accessdate=2021-4-23}}。 境内には樹齢700余年といわれる大樟が群生しており、徳島県の天然記念物にも指定されている。大樟の根元に白蛇2匹が棲み、時にふれ轟明神の使者として境内に現れ、これを見た者には幸福が訪れるという伝説がある{{cite web|url=https://www.anan-kankou.jp/docs/2016120800022/|title=轟神社|publisher=阿南市観光協会|accessdate=2021-4-23}}。 == 祭神 == * [[シナツヒコ|級長津比古命]] * 級長津比女 == 交通 == * [[四国旅客鉄道|JR]][[牟岐線]]「[[新野駅]]」より徒歩で約30分。 == 脚注 == == 外部リンク == * [https://www.city.anan.tokushima.jp/docs/2010120800440/ 轟神社] - 阿南市 {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:ととろきしんしや}} [[category:徳島県の神社]] [[Category:阿南市の歴史]] [[Category:阿南市の建築物]]

{{神社 |名称= 轟神社 |画像= {{画像募集中|cat=阿南市}} |所在地= [[徳島県]][[阿南市]][[新野町]]北宮の久保4 |位置= |祭神= [[シナツヒコ|級長津比古命]]
級長津比女 |社格= |創建= [[814年]]（[[弘仁]]元年） |本殿= |別名= |例祭= |神事= |}} '''轟神社'''（とどろきじんじゃ）は、[[徳島県]][[阿南市]][[新野町]]にある[[神社]]である。 == 歴史 == [[814年]]（[[弘仁]]元年）に[[大和国]]の[[龍田神社]]の分霊を勧請して創建したと伝わる。祭神は龍田風神と呼ばれ、農家や航海業者の信仰が厚い神である{{cite web|url=https://www.city.anan.tokushima.jp/docs/2010120800440/|title=轟神社|publisher=阿南市|accessdate=2021-4-23}}。 境内には樹齢700余年といわれる大樟が群生しており、徳島県の天然記念物にも指定されている。大樟の根元に白蛇2匹が棲み、時にふれ轟明神の使者として境内に現れ、これを見た者には幸福が訪れるという伝説がある{{cite web|url=https://www.anan-kankou.jp/docs/2016120800022/|title=轟神社|publisher=阿南市観光協会|accessdate=2021-4-23}}。 == 祭神 == * [[シナツヒコ|級長津比古命]] * 級長津比女 == 交通 == * [[四国旅客鉄道|JR]][[牟岐線]]「[[新野駅]]」より徒歩で約30分。 == 脚注 == == 外部リンク == * [https://www.city.anan.tokushima.jp/docs/2010120800440/ 轟神社] - 阿南市 {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:ととろきしんしや}} [[category:徳島県の神社]] [[Category:阿南市の歴史]] [[Category:阿南市の建築物]]

{{神社 |名称= 轟神社 |画像= [[File:Todoroki-shrine.jpg|270px]] |所在地= [[徳島県]][[阿南市]][[新野町]]宮ノ北41 |位置 = {{Coord|33|50|51.2|N|134|34|42.5|E|type:landmark_region:JP-36|display=inline,title}} |祭神= [[シナツヒコ|級長津比古命]]
級長津比女 |社格= |創建= [[814年]]（[[弘仁]]元年） |本殿= |別名= |例祭= |神事= |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Tokushima Prefecture|label=轟神社|float=center|relief=1|width=256}} }} '''轟神社'''（とどろきじんじゃ）は、[[徳島県]][[阿南市]][[新野町]]にある[[神社]]である。 == 概要 == {{multiple image | footer = | align = left | total_width = 750 | image1 = Todoroki-shrine 3.jpg | caption1 = | image2 = Aratano-kusu-no-gunsei 4.jpg | caption2 = }}{{-}} == 歴史 == [[814年]]（[[弘仁]]元年）に[[大和国]]の[[龍田神社]]の分霊を勧請して創建したと伝わる。祭神は龍田風神と呼ばれ、農家や航海業者の信仰が厚い神である{{cite web|url=https://www.city.anan.tokushima.jp/docs/2010120800440/|title=轟神社|publisher=阿南市|accessdate=2021-4-23}}。 == 祭神 == * [[シナツヒコ|級長津比古命]] * 級長津比女 == 新野のクスの群生 == {{multiple image | footer = | align = left | total_width = 1000 | image1 = Aratano-kusu-no-gunsei 3.jpg | caption1 = | image2 = Aratano-kusu-no-gunsei.jpg | caption2 = | image3 = Todoroki-shrine 4.jpg | caption3 = }} {{multiple image | footer = | align = left | total_width = 750 | image1 = Aratano-kusu-no-gunsei 2.jpg | caption1 = | image2 = 轟神社（徳島・新野）.jpg | caption2 = }}{{-}} 境内には樹齢700余年といわれる大樟が群生しており、徳島県の天然記念物にも指定されている。大樟の根元に白蛇2匹が棲み、時にふれ轟明神の使者として境内に現れ、これを見た者には幸福が訪れるという伝説がある{{cite web|url=https://www.anan-kankou.jp/docs/2016120800022/|title=轟神社|publisher=阿南市観光協会|accessdate=2021-4-23}}。 == 周辺 == [[File:Todoroki-shrine front.jpg|thumb|300px|left|境内から参道]] {{-}} == 交通 == * [[四国旅客鉄道|JR]][[牟岐線]][[新野駅 (徳島県)|新野駅]]より徒歩で約30分。 == 脚注 == == 外部リンク == * [https://www.city.anan.tokushima.jp/docs/2010120800440/ 轟神社] - 阿南市 {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:ととろきしんしや}} [[category:徳島県の神社]] [[Category:阿南市の歴史]] [[Category:阿南市の建築物]]

{{神社 |名称= 轟神社 |画像= [[File:Todoroki-shrine.jpg|270px]] |所在地= [[徳島県]][[阿南市]][[新野町 (阿南市)|新野町]]宮ノ北41 |位置 = {{Coord|33|50|51.2|N|134|34|42.5|E|type:landmark_region:JP-36|display=inline,title}} |祭神= [[シナツヒコ|級長津比古命]]

{{神社 |名称= 轟神社 |画像= [[File:Todoroki-shrine.jpg|300px]] |所在地= [[徳島県]][[阿南市]][[新野町 (阿南市)|新野町]]宮ノ北41 |位置 = {{Coord|33|50|51.2|N|134|34|42.5|E|type:landmark_region:JP-36|display=inline,title}} |祭神= [[シナツヒコ|級長津比古命]]
級長津比女 |社格= |創建= [[814年]]（[[弘仁]]元年） |本殿= |別名= |例祭= |神事= |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Tokushima Prefecture|label=轟神社|float=center|relief=1|width=256}} }} [[File:Todoroki-shrine front.jpg|thumb|lef|260px|right|境内から参道]] '''轟神社'''（とどろきじんじゃ）は、[[徳島県]][[阿南市]][[新野町]]にある[[神社]]である。 == 歴史 == [[814年]]（[[弘仁]]元年）に[[大和国]]の[[龍田神社]]の分霊を勧請して創建したと伝わる。祭神は龍田風神と呼ばれ、農家や航海業者の信仰が厚い神である{{Cite web|和書|url=https://www.city.anan.tokushima.jp/docs/2010120800440/|title=轟神社|publisher=阿南市|accessdate=2021-4-23}}。 == 祭神 == * [[シナツヒコ|級長津比古命]] * 級長津比女 == 新野のクスの群生 == 境内には樹齢700余年といわれる大樟が群生しており、徳島県の天然記念物にも指定されている。大樟の根元に白蛇2匹が棲み、時にふれ轟明神の使者として境内に現れ、これを見た者には幸福が訪れるという伝説がある{{Cite web|和書|url=https://www.anan-kankou.jp/docs/2016120800022/|title=轟神社|publisher=阿南市観光協会|accessdate=2021-4-23}}。 ファイル:Todoroki-shrine 3.jpg ファイル:Aratano-kusu-no-gunsei 4.jpg ファイル:Aratano-kusu-no-gunsei 3.jpg ファイル:Aratano-kusu-no-gunsei.jpg ファイル:Todoroki-shrine 4.jpg ファイル:Aratano-kusu-no-gunsei 2.jpg == 交通 == * [[四国旅客鉄道|JR]][[牟岐線]]「[[新野駅 (徳島県)|新野駅]]」より徒歩で約30分。 == 脚注 == == 外部リンク == * [https://www.city.anan.tokushima.jp/docs/2010120800440/ 轟神社] - 阿南市 {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:ととろきしんしや}} [[category:徳島県の神社]] [[Category:阿南市の歴史]] [[Category:阿南市の建築物]]

{{神社 | 名称 = 轟神社 | 画像 = [[File:Todoroki-shrine.jpg|250px]] | 所在地 = [[徳島県]][[阿南市]][[新野町 (阿南市)|新野町]]宮ノ北41 | 位置 = {{Coord|33|50|51.2|N|134|34|42.5|E|type:landmark_region:JP-36|display=inline,title}} | 祭神 = {{Ublist| [[シナツヒコ|級長津比古命]] | 級長津比女 }} | 社格 = | 創建 = [[814年]]（[[弘仁]]元年） | 本殿 = | 別名 = | 例祭 = | 神事 = | 地図 = {{Location map|Japan Tokushima Prefecture|label=轟神社|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=20|float=center|border=none|width=200|caption=|relief=1}} }} '''轟神社'''（とどろきじんじゃ）は、[[徳島県]][[阿南市]][[新野町]]にある[[神社]]である。
== 歴史 == [[814年]]（[[弘仁]]元年）に[[大和国]]の[[龍田神社]]の分霊を勧請して創建したと伝わる。祭神は龍田風神と呼ばれ、農家や航海業者の信仰が厚い神である<ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=https://www.city.anan.tokushima.jp/docs/2010120800440/|title=轟神社|publisher=阿南市|accessdate=2021-4-23}}</ref>。 <gallery widths=200 heights=140> Todoroki-shrine front.jpg|境内から参道 </gallery>
== 祭神 == * [[シナツヒコ|級長津比古命]] * 級長津比女
== 新野のクスの群生 == 境内には樹齢700余年といわれる大樟が群生しており、徳島県の天然記念物にも指定されている。大樟の根元に白蛇2匹が棲み、時にふれ轟明神の使者として境内に現れ、これを見た者には幸福が訪れるという伝説がある<ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=https://www.anan-kankou.jp/docs/2016120800022/|title=轟神社|publisher=阿南市観光協会|accessdate=2021-4-23}}</ref>。
<gallery> Todoroki-shrine 3.jpg Aratano-kusu-no-gunsei 4.jpg Aratano-kusu-no-gunsei 3.jpg Aratano-kusu-no-gunsei.jpg Todoroki-shrine 4.jpg Aratano-kusu-no-gunsei 2.jpg </gallery>
== 交通 == * [[四国旅客鉄道|JR]][[牟岐線]]「[[新野駅 (徳島県)|新野駅]]」より徒歩で約30分。
== 脚注 == <references />
== 外部リンク == * [https://www.city.anan.tokushima.jp/docs/2010120800440/ 轟神社] - 阿南市
{{shinto-stub}}

{{Shrine | Name = Todoroki Shrine | Image = [[File:Todoroki-shrine.jpg|250px]] | Location = Miyano-kita 41, Aratano-chō, [[Anan]], [[Tokushima Prefecture]] | Coordinates = {{Coord|33|50|51.2|N|134|34|42.5|E|type:landmark_region:JP-36|display=inline,title}} | Deity = {{Ublist|[[Shinatsuhiko|級長津比古命]]|級長津比女}} | Shrine rank = | Foundation = [[814]] (Kōnin 1) | Main hall = | Alternate names = | Annual festival = | Rituals = | Map = {{Location map|Japan Tokushima Prefecture|label=Todoroki Shrine|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=20|float=center|border=none|width=200|caption=|relief=1}} }} '''Todoroki Shrine''' (轟神社, Todoroki Jinja) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}} located in [[Aratano-chō]], [[Anan]], [[Tokushima Prefecture]].
== History == The shrine is believed to have been founded in [[814]] (Kōnin 1) by enshrining a divided spirit from {{ill|Tatsuta Shrine|ja|龍田神社}} in {{ill|Yamato Province|ja|大和国}}. The enshrined deity, referred to as the Tatsuta Wind God, has long been venerated by farmers and maritime workers.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.city.anan.tokushima.jp/docs/2010120800440/|title=Todoroki Shrine|publisher=Anan City|accessdate=2021-04-23}}</ref>
<gallery widths=200 heights=140> Todoroki-shrine front.jpg|Pathway from the shrine precincts </gallery>
== Deities == * [[Shinatsuhiko|級長津比古命]] * 級長津比女
== Aratano's Camphor Tree Grove == The shrine grounds feature a grove of camphor trees estimated to be over 700 years old. This grove is designated as a Natural Monument of Tokushima Prefecture. According to legend, two white snakes inhabit the roots of the largest tree. Occasionally appearing as messengers of Todoroki Myōjin, those who witness the snakes are said to receive good fortune.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.anan-kankou.jp/docs/2016120800022/|title=Todoroki Shrine|publisher=Anan City Tourism Association|accessdate=2021-04-23|url-status=dead|url-status-date=2024-09-19}}</ref>
<gallery> Todoroki-shrine 3.jpg Aratano-kusu-no-gunsei 4.jpg Aratano-kusu-no-gunsei 3.jpg Aratano-kusu-no-gunsei.jpg Todoroki-shrine 4.jpg Aratano-kusu-no-gunsei 2.jpg </gallery>
== Access == * Approximately 30 minutes on foot from [[Shikoku Railway Company|JR]] [[Mugi Line]]'s {{ill|Aratano Station|ja|新野駅 (徳島県)}}.
== References == <references />
== External Links == * [https://www.city.anan.tokushima.jp/docs/2010120800440/ Todoroki Shrine] - Anan City

revision.text:
{{Shrine | Name = Todoroki Shrine | Image = [[File:Todoroki-shrine.jpg|250px]] | Location = Miyano-kita 41, Aratano-chō, [[Anan]], [[Tokushima Prefecture]] | Coordinates = {{Coord|33|50|51.2|N|134|34|42.5|E|type:landmark_region:JP-36|display=inline,title}} | Deity = {{Ublist|[[Shinatsuhiko|級長津比古命]]|級長津比女}} | Shrine rank = | Foundation = [[814]] (Kōnin 1) | Main hall = | Alternate names = | Annual festival = | Rituals = | Map = {{Location map|Japan Tokushima Prefecture|label=Todoroki Shrine|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=20|float=center|border=none|width=200|caption=|relief=1}} }} '''Todoroki Shrine''' (轟神社, Todoroki Jinja) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}} located in [[Aratano-chō]], [[Anan]], [[Tokushima Prefecture]].
== History == The shrine is believed to have been founded in [[814]] (Kōnin 1) by enshrining a divided spirit from {{ill|Tatsuta Shrine|ja|龍田神社}} in {{ill|Yamato Province|ja|大和国}}. The enshrined deity, referred to as the Tatsuta Wind God, has long been venerated by farmers and maritime workers.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.city.anan.tokushima.jp/docs/2010120800440/|title=Todoroki Shrine|publisher=Anan City|accessdate=2021-04-23}}</ref>
<gallery widths=200 heights=140> Todoroki-shrine front.jpg|Pathway from the shrine precincts </gallery>
== Deities == * [[Shinatsuhiko|級長津比古命]] * 級長津比女
== Aratano's Camphor Tree Grove == The shrine grounds feature a grove of camphor trees estimated to be over 700 years old. This grove is designated as a Natural Monument of Tokushima Prefecture. According to legend, two white snakes inhabit the roots of the largest tree. Occasionally appearing as messengers of Todoroki Myōjin, those who witness the snakes are said to receive good fortune.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.anan-kankou.jp/docs/2016120800022/|title=Todoroki Shrine|publisher=Anan City Tourism Association|accessdate=2021-04-23|url-status=dead|url-status-date=2024-09-19}}</ref>
<gallery> Todoroki-shrine 3.jpg Aratano-kusu-no-gunsei 4.jpg Aratano-kusu-no-gunsei 3.jpg Aratano-kusu-no-gunsei.jpg Todoroki-shrine 4.jpg Aratano-kusu-no-gunsei 2.jpg </gallery>
== Access == * Approximately 30 minutes on foot from [[Shikoku Railway Company|JR]] [[Mugi Line]]'s {{ill|Aratano Station|ja|新野駅 (徳島県)}}.
== References == <references />
== External Links == * [https://www.city.anan.tokushima.jp/docs/2010120800440/ Todoroki Shrine] - Anan City
{{shinto-stub}}

The enshrined deity, referred to as the Tatsuta Wind God, has long been venerated by farmers and maritime workers.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.city.anan.tokushima.jp/docs/2010120800440/|title=Todoroki Shrine|publisher=Anan City|accessdate=2021-04-23}}</ref>
<gallery widths=200 heights=140> Todoroki-shrine front.jpg|Pathway from the shrine precincts </gallery>
== Deities == * [[Shinatsuhiko|級長津比古命]] * 級長津比女
== Aratano's Camphor Tree Grove == The shrine grounds feature a grove of camphor trees estimated to be over 700 years old. This grove is designated as a Natural Monument of Tokushima Prefecture. According to legend, two white snakes inhabit the roots of the largest tree. Occasionally appearing as messengers of Todoroki Myōjin, those who witness the snakes are said to receive good fortune.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.anan-kankou.jp/docs/2016120800022/|title=Todoroki Shrine|publisher=Anan City Tourism Association|accessdate=2021-04-23|url-status=dead|url-status-date=2024-09-19}}</ref>
<gallery> Todoroki-shrine 3.jpg Aratano-kusu-no-gunsei 4.jpg Aratano-kusu-no-gunsei 3.jpg Aratano-kusu-no-gunsei.jpg Todoroki-shrine 4.jpg Aratano-kusu-no-gunsei 2.jpg </gallery>
== Access == * Approximately 30 minutes on foot from [[Shikoku Railway Company|JR]] [[Mugi Line]]'s {{ill|Aratano Station|ja|新野駅 (徳島県)}}.
== References == <references />
== External Links == * [https://www.city.anan.tokushima.jp/docs/2010120800440/ Todoroki Shrine] - Anan City

revision.text:
{{Shrine | name = Todoroki Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = [[File:Todoroki-shrine.jpg|250px]] | location = Miyano-kita 41, Aratano-chō, [[Anan]], [[Tokushima Prefecture]] | coordinates = {{Coord|33|50|51.2|N|134|34|42.5|E|type:landmark_region:JP-36|display=inline,title}} | Deity = {{Ublist|[[Shinatsuhiko|級長津比古命]]|級長津比女}} | Shrine rank = | Foundation = [[814]] (Kōnin 1) | Main hall = | Alternate names = | Annual festival = | Rituals = | Map = {{location map|Japan Tokushima Prefecture|label=Todoroki Shrine|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=20|float=center|border=none|width=200|caption=|relief=1}} }} '''Todoroki Shrine''' (轟神社, Todoroki Jinja) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}} located in [[Aratano-chō]], [[Anan]], [[Tokushima Prefecture]].
== History == The shrine is believed to have been founded in [[814]] (Kōnin 1) by enshrining a divided spirit from {{ill|Tatsuta Shrine|ja|龍田神社}} in {{ill|Yamato Province|ja|大和国}}. The enshrined deity, referred to as the Tatsuta Wind God, has long been venerated by farmers and maritime workers.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.city.anan.tokushima.jp/docs/2010120800440/|title=Todoroki Shrine|publisher=Anan City|accessdate=2021-04-23}}</ref>
<gallery widths=200 heights=140> Todoroki-shrine front.jpg|Pathway from the shrine precincts </gallery>
== Deities == * [[Shinatsuhiko|級長津比古命]] * 級長津比女
== Aratano's Camphor Tree Grove == The shrine grounds feature a grove of camphor trees estimated to be over 700 years old. This grove is designated as a Natural Monument of Tokushima Prefecture. According to legend, two white snakes inhabit the roots of the largest tree. Occasionally appearing as messengers of Todoroki Myōjin, those who witness the snakes are said to receive good fortune.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.anan-kankou.jp/docs/2016120800022/|title=Todoroki Shrine|publisher=Anan City Tourism Association|accessdate=2021-04-23|url-status=dead|url-status-date=2024-09-19}}</ref>
<gallery> Todoroki-shrine 3.jpg Aratano-kusu-no-gunsei 4.jpg Aratano-kusu-no-gunsei 3.jpg Aratano-kusu-no-gunsei.jpg Todoroki-shrine 4.jpg Aratano-kusu-no-gunsei 2.jpg </gallery>
== Access == * Approximately 30 minutes on foot from [[Shikoku Railway Company|JR]] [[Mugi Line]]'s {{ill|Aratano Station|ja|新野駅 (徳島県)}}.
== References == <references />
== External Links == * [https://www.city.anan.tokushima.jp/docs/2010120800440/ Todoroki Shrine] - Anan City
{{shinto-stub}}

== History == The shrine is believed to have been founded in [[814]] (Kōnin 1) by enshrining a divided spirit from {{ill|Tatsuta Shrine|ja|龍田神社}} in {{ill|Yamato Province|ja|大和国}}. The enshrined deity, referred to as the Tatsuta Wind God, has long been venerated by farmers and maritime workers.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.city.anan.tokushima.jp/docs/2010120800440/|title=Todoroki Shrine|publisher=Anan City|accessdate=2021-04-23}}</ref>
<gallery widths=200 heights=140> Todoroki-shrine front.jpg|Pathway from the shrine precincts </gallery>
== Deities == * [[Shinatsuhiko|級長津比古命]] * 級長津比女
== Aratano's Camphor Tree Grove == The shrine grounds feature a grove of camphor trees estimated to be over 700 years old. This grove is designated as a Natural Monument of Tokushima Prefecture. According to legend, two white snakes inhabit the roots of the largest tree. Occasionally appearing as messengers of Todoroki Myōjin, those who witness the snakes are said to receive good fortune.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.anan-kankou.jp/docs/2016120800022/|title=Todoroki Shrine|publisher=Anan City Tourism Association|accessdate=2021-04-23|url-status=dead|url-status-date=2024-09-19}}</ref>

The enshrined deity, referred to as the Tatsuta Wind God, has long been venerated by farmers and maritime workers.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.city.anan.tokushima.jp/docs/2010120800440/|title=Todoroki Shrine|publisher=Anan City|accessdate=2021-04-23}}</ref>
<gallery widths=200 heights=140> Todoroki-shrine front.jpg|Pathway from the shrine precincts </gallery>
== Deities == * [[Shinatsuhiko|級長津比古命]] * 級長津比女
== Aratano's Camphor Tree Grove == The shrine grounds feature a grove of camphor trees estimated to be over 700 years old. This grove is designated as a Natural Monument of Tokushima Prefecture. According to legend, two white snakes inhabit the roots of the largest tree. Occasionally appearing as messengers of Todoroki Myōjin, those who witness the snakes are said to receive good fortune.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.anan-kankou.jp/docs/2016120800022/|title=Todoroki Shrine|publisher=Anan City Tourism Association|accessdate=2021-04-23|url-status=dead|url-status-date=2024-09-19}}</ref>

== Access == * Approximately 30 minutes on foot from [[Shikoku Railway Company|JR]] [[Mugi Line]]'s {{ill|Aratano Station|ja|新野駅 (徳島県)}}.

{{Shrine | name = Todoroki Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = [[File:Todoroki-shrine.jpg|250px]] | location = Miyano-kita 41, Aratano-chō, [[Anan]], [[Tokushima Prefecture]] | coordinates = {{Coord|33|50|51.2|N|134|34|42.5|E|type:landmark_region:JP-36|display=inline,title}} | deity = {{Ublist|[[Shinatsuhiko|級長津比古命]]|級長津比女}} | Shrine rank = | Foundation = [[814]] (Kōnin 1) | Main hall = | Alternate names = | Annual festival = | Rituals = | Map = {{location map|Japan Tokushima Prefecture|label=Todoroki Shrine|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=20|float=center|border=none|width=200|caption=|relief=1}} }} '''Todoroki Shrine''' (轟神社, Todoroki Jinja) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}} located in [[Aratano-chō]], [[Anan]], [[Tokushima Prefecture]].
== History == The shrine is believed to have been founded in [[814]] (Kōnin 1) by enshrining a divided spirit from {{ill|Tatsuta Shrine|ja|龍田神社}} in {{ill|Yamato Province|ja|大和国}}. The enshrined deity, referred to as the Tatsuta Wind God, has long been venerated by farmers and maritime workers.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.city.anan.tokushima.jp/docs/2010120800440/|title=Todoroki Shrine|publisher=Anan City|accessdate=2021-04-23}}</ref>
<gallery widths=200 heights=140> Todoroki-shrine front.jpg|Pathway from the shrine precincts </gallery>
== Deities == * [[Shinatsuhiko|級長津比古命]] * 級長津比女
== Aratano's Camphor Tree Grove == The shrine grounds feature a grove of camphor trees estimated to be over 700 years old. This grove is designated as a Natural Monument of Tokushima Prefecture. According to legend, two white snakes inhabit the roots of the largest tree. Occasionally appearing as messengers of Todoroki Myōjin, those who witness the snakes are said to receive good fortune.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.anan-kankou.jp/docs/2016120800022/|title=Todoroki Shrine|publisher=Anan City Tourism Association|accessdate=2021-04-23|url-status=dead|url-status-date=2024-09-19}}</ref>
<gallery> Todoroki-shrine 3.jpg Aratano-kusu-no-gunsei 4.jpg Aratano-kusu-no-gunsei 3.jpg Aratano-kusu-no-gunsei.jpg Todoroki-shrine 4.jpg Aratano-kusu-no-gunsei 2.jpg </gallery>
== Access == * Approximately 30 minutes on foot from [[Shikoku Railway Company|JR]] [[Mugi Line]]'s {{ill|Aratano Station|ja|新野駅 (徳島県)}}.
== References == <references />
== External Links == * [https://www.city.anan.tokushima.jp/docs/2010120800440/ Todoroki Shrine] - Anan City

revision.text:
{{Shrine | name = Todoroki Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = [[File:Todoroki-shrine.jpg|250px]] | location = Miyano-kita 41, Aratano-chō, [[Anan]], [[Tokushima Prefecture]] | coordinates = {{Coord|33|50|51.2|N|134|34|42.5|E|type:landmark_region:JP-36|display=inline,title}} | deity = {{Ublist|[[Shinatsuhiko|級長津比古命]]|級長津比女}} | Shrine rank = | Foundation = [[814]] (Kōnin 1) | Main hall = | Alternate names = | Annual festival = | Rituals = | Map = {{location map|Japan Tokushima Prefecture|label=Todoroki Shrine|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=20|float=center|border=none|width=200|caption=|relief=1}} }} '''Todoroki Shrine''' (轟神社, Todoroki Jinja) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}} located in [[Aratano-chō]], [[Anan]], [[Tokushima Prefecture]].
== History == The shrine is believed to have been founded in [[814]] (Kōnin 1) by enshrining a divided spirit from {{ill|Tatsuta Shrine|ja|龍田神社}} in {{ill|Yamato Province|ja|大和国}}. The enshrined deity, referred to as the Tatsuta Wind God, has long been venerated by farmers and maritime workers.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.city.anan.tokushima.jp/docs/2010120800440/|title=Todoroki Shrine|publisher=Anan City|accessdate=2021-04-23}}</ref>
<gallery widths=200 heights=140> Todoroki-shrine front.jpg|Pathway from the shrine precincts </gallery>
== Deities == * [[Shinatsuhiko|級長津比古命]] * 級長津比女
== Aratano's Camphor Tree Grove == The shrine grounds feature a grove of camphor trees estimated to be over 700 years old. This grove is designated as a Natural Monument of Tokushima Prefecture. According to legend, two white snakes inhabit the roots of the largest tree. Occasionally appearing as messengers of Todoroki Myōjin, those who witness the snakes are said to receive good fortune.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.anan-kankou.jp/docs/2016120800022/|title=Todoroki Shrine|publisher=Anan City Tourism Association|accessdate=2021-04-23|url-status=dead|url-status-date=2024-09-19}}</ref>
<gallery> Todoroki-shrine 3.jpg Aratano-kusu-no-gunsei 4.jpg Aratano-kusu-no-gunsei 3.jpg Aratano-kusu-no-gunsei.jpg Todoroki-shrine 4.jpg Aratano-kusu-no-gunsei 2.jpg </gallery>
== Access == * Approximately 30 minutes on foot from [[Shikoku Railway Company|JR]] [[Mugi Line]]'s {{ill|Aratano Station|ja|新野駅 (徳島県)}}.
== References == <references />
== External Links == * [https://www.city.anan.tokushima.jp/docs/2010120800440/ Todoroki Shrine] - Anan City

{{Shrine | name = Todoroki Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = [[File:Todoroki-shrine.jpg|250px]] | location = Miyano-kita 41, Aratano-chō, [[Anan]], [[Tokushima Prefecture]] | coordinates = {{Coord|33|50|51.2|N|134|34|42.5|E|type:landmark_region:JP-36|display=inline,title}} | deity = {{Ublist|[[Shinatsuhiko|級長津比古命]]|級長津比女}} | Shrine rank = | Foundation = [[814]] (Kōnin 1) | Main hall = | Alternate names = | Annual festival = | Rituals = | Map = {{location map|Japan Tokushima Prefecture|label=Todoroki Shrine|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=20|float=center|border=none|width=200|caption=|relief=1}} }} '''Todoroki Shrine''' (轟神社, Todoroki Jinja) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}} located in [[Aratano-chō]], [[Anan]], [[Tokushima Prefecture]].
== History == The shrine is believed to have been founded in [[814]] (Kōnin 1) by enshrining a divided spirit from {{ill|Tatsuta Shrine|ja|龍田神社}} in {{ill|Yamato Province|ja|Yamato Province }}. The enshrined deity, referred to as the Tatsuta Wind God, has long been venerated by farmers and maritime workers.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.city.anan.tokushima.jp/docs/2010120800440/|title=Todoroki Shrine|publisher=Anan City|accessdate=2021-04-23}}</ref>
<gallery widths=200 heights=140> Todoroki-shrine front.jpg|Pathway from the shrine precincts </gallery>
== Deities == * [[Shinatsuhiko|級長津比古命]] * 級長津比女
== Aratano's Camphor Tree Grove == The shrine grounds feature a grove of camphor trees estimated to be over 700 years old. This grove is designated as a Natural Monument of Tokushima Prefecture. According to legend, two white snakes inhabit the roots of the largest tree. Occasionally appearing as messengers of Todoroki Myōjin, those who witness the snakes are said to receive good fortune.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.anan-kankou.jp/docs/2016120800022/|title=Todoroki Shrine|publisher=Anan City Tourism Association|accessdate=2021-04-23|url-status=dead|url-status-date=2024-09-19}}</ref>
<gallery> Todoroki-shrine 3.jpg Aratano-kusu-no-gunsei 4.jpg Aratano-kusu-no-gunsei 3.jpg Aratano-kusu-no-gunsei.jpg Todoroki-shrine 4.jpg Aratano-kusu-no-gunsei 2.jpg </gallery>
== Access == * Approximately 30 minutes on foot from [[Shikoku Railway Company|JR]] [[Mugi Line]]'s {{ill|Aratano Station|ja|新野駅 (徳島県)}}.
== References == <references />
== External Links == * [https://www.city.anan.tokushima.jp/docs/2010120800440/ Todoroki Shrine] - Anan City

{{Shrine | name = Todoroki Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = [[File:Todoroki-shrine.jpg|250px]] | location = Miyano-kita 41, Aratano-chō, [[Anan]], [[Tokushima Prefecture]] | coordinates = {{Coord|33|50|51.2|N|134|34|42.5|E|type:landmark_region:JP-36|display=inline,title}} | deity = {{Ublist|[[Shinatsuhiko|級長津比古命]]|級長津比女}} | Shrine rank = | Foundation = [[814]] (Kōnin 1) | Main hall = | Alternate names = | Annual festival = | Rituals = | Map = {{location map|Japan Tokushima Prefecture|label=Todoroki Shrine|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=20|float=center|border=none|width=200|caption=|relief=1}} }} '''Todoroki Shrine''' (轟神社, Todoroki Jinja) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}} located in [[Aratano-chō]], [[Anan]], [[Tokushima Prefecture]].
== History == The shrine is believed to have been founded in [[814]] (Kōnin 1) by enshrining a divided spirit from {{ill|Tatsuta Shrine|ja|龍田神社}} in {{ill|Yamato Province|ja|Yamato Province }}. The enshrined deity, referred to as the Tatsuta Wind God, has long been venerated by farmers and maritime workers.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.city.anan.tokushima.jp/docs/2010120800440/|title=Todoroki Shrine|publisher=Anan City|accessdate=2021-04-23}}</ref>
<gallery widths=200 heights=140> Todoroki-shrine front.jpg|Pathway from the shrine precincts </gallery>
== Deities == * [[Shinatsuhiko|級長津比古命]] * 級長津比女
== Aratano's Camphor Tree Grove == The shrine grounds feature a grove of camphor trees estimated to be over 700 years old. This grove is designated as a Natural Monument of Tokushima Prefecture. According to legend, two white snakes inhabit the roots of the largest tree. Occasionally appearing as messengers of Todoroki Myōjin, those who witness the snakes are said to receive good fortune.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.anan-kankou.jp/docs/2016120800022/|title=Todoroki Shrine|publisher=Anan City Tourism Association|accessdate=2021-04-23|url-status=dead|url-status-date=2024-09-19}}</ref>
<gallery> Todoroki-shrine 3.jpg Aratano-kusu-no-gunsei 4.jpg Aratano-kusu-no-gunsei 3.jpg Aratano-kusu-no-gunsei.jpg Todoroki-shrine 4.jpg Aratano-kusu-no-gunsei 2.jpg </gallery>
== Access == * Approximately 30 minutes on foot from [[Shikoku Railway Company|JR]] [[Mugi Line]]'s {{ill|Aratano Station|ja|新野駅 (徳島県)}}.
== References == <references />
== External Links == * [https://www.city.anan.tokushima.jp/docs/2010120800440/ Todoroki Shrine] - Anan City
{{shinto-stub}}

{{Shrine | name = Todoroki Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = [[File:Todoroki-shrine.jpg|250px]] | location = Miyano-kita 41, Aratano-chō, [[Anan]], [[Tokushima Prefecture]] | coordinates = {{Coord|33|50|51.2|N|134|34|42.5|E|type:landmark_region:JP-36|display=inline,title}} | deity = {{Ublist|[[Shinatsuhiko|級長津比古命]]|級長津比女}} | Shrine rank = | Foundation = [[814]] (Kōnin 1) | Main hall = | alternate_name = | Annual festival = | Rituals = | Map = {{location map|Japan Tokushima Prefecture|label=Todoroki Shrine|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=20|float=center|border=none|width=200|caption=|relief=1}} }} '''Todoroki Shrine''' (轟神社, Todoroki Jinja) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社}} located in [[Aratano-chō]], [[Anan]], [[Tokushima Prefecture]].
== History == The shrine is believed to have been founded in [[814]] (Kōnin 1) by enshrining a divided spirit from {{ill|Tatsuta Shrine|ja|龍田神社}} in {{ill|Yamato Province|ja|Yamato Province }}. The enshrined deity, referred to as the Tatsuta Wind God, has long been venerated by farmers and maritime workers.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.city.anan.tokushima.jp/docs/2010120800440/|title=Todoroki Shrine|publisher=Anan City|accessdate=2021-04-23}}</ref>
<gallery widths=200 heights=140> Todoroki-shrine front.jpg|Pathway from the shrine precincts </gallery>
== Deities == * [[Shinatsuhiko|級長津比古命]] * 級長津比女
== Aratano's Camphor Tree Grove == The shrine grounds feature a grove of camphor trees estimated to be over 700 years old. This grove is designated as a Natural Monument of Tokushima Prefecture. According to legend, two white snakes inhabit the roots of the largest tree. Occasionally appearing as messengers of Todoroki Myōjin, those who witness the snakes are said to receive good fortune.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.anan-kankou.jp/docs/2016120800022/|title=Todoroki Shrine|publisher=Anan City Tourism Association|accessdate=2021-04-23|url-status=dead|url-status-date=2024-09-19}}</ref>
<gallery> Todoroki-shrine 3.jpg Aratano-kusu-no-gunsei 4.jpg Aratano-kusu-no-gunsei 3.jpg Aratano-kusu-no-gunsei.jpg Todoroki-shrine 4.jpg Aratano-kusu-no-gunsei 2.jpg </gallery>
== Access == * Approximately 30 minutes on foot from [[Shikoku Railway Company|JR]] [[Mugi Line]]'s {{ill|Aratano Station|ja|新野駅 (徳島県)}}.
== References == <references />
== External Links == * [https://www.city.anan.tokushima.jp/docs/2010120800440/ Todoroki Shrine] - Anan City
{{shinto-stub}}

{{Shrine | name = Todoroki Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = [[File:Todoroki-shrine.jpg|250px]] | location = Miyano-kita 41, Aratano-chō, [[Anan]], [[Tokushima Prefecture]] | coordinates = {{Coord|33|50|51.2|N|134|34|42.5|E|type:landmark_region:JP-36|display=inline,title}} | deity = {{Ublist|[[Shinatsuhiko|級長津比古命]]|級長津比女}} | Shrine rank = | Foundation = [[814]] (Kōnin 1) | Main hall = | alternate_name = | Annual festival = | Rituals = | Map = {{location map|Japan Tokushima Prefecture|label=Todoroki Shrine|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=20|float=center|border=none|width=200|caption=|relief=1}} }} '''Todoroki Shrine''' (轟神社, Todoroki Jinja) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|ja|神社|12=draft}} located in [[Aratano-chō]], [[Anan]], [[Tokushima Prefecture]].
== History == The shrine is believed to have been founded in [[814]] (Kōnin 1) by enshrining a divided spirit from {{ill|Tatsuta Shrine|ja|龍田神社|12=draft}} in {{ill|Yamato Province|ja|Yamato Province|12=draft}}. The enshrined deity, referred to as the Tatsuta Wind God, has long been venerated by farmers and maritime workers.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.city.anan.tokushima.jp/docs/2010120800440/|title=Todoroki Shrine|publisher=Anan City|accessdate=2021-04-23}}</ref>
<gallery widths=200 heights=140> Todoroki-shrine front.jpg|Pathway from the shrine precincts </gallery>
== Deities == * [[Shinatsuhiko|級長津比古命]] * 級長津比女
== Aratano's Camphor Tree Grove == The shrine grounds feature a grove of camphor trees estimated to be over 700 years old. This grove is designated as a Natural Monument of Tokushima Prefecture. According to legend, two white snakes inhabit the roots of the largest tree. Occasionally appearing as messengers of Todoroki Myōjin, those who witness the snakes are said to receive good fortune.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.anan-kankou.jp/docs/2016120800022/|title=Todoroki Shrine|publisher=Anan City Tourism Association|accessdate=2021-04-23|url-status=dead|url-status-date=2024-09-19}}</ref>
<gallery> Todoroki-shrine 3.jpg Aratano-kusu-no-gunsei 4.jpg Aratano-kusu-no-gunsei 3.jpg Aratano-kusu-no-gunsei.jpg Todoroki-shrine 4.jpg Aratano-kusu-no-gunsei 2.jpg </gallery>
== Access == * Approximately 30 minutes on foot from [[Shikoku Railway Company|JR]] [[Mugi Line]]'s {{ill|Aratano Station|ja|新野駅 (徳島県)|12=draft}}.
== References == <references />
== External Links == * [https://www.city.anan.tokushima.jp/docs/2010120800440/ Todoroki Shrine] - Anan City
{{shinto-stub}}
<!--Todoroki Shrine (Anan)-->
{{draft categories| [[Category:Shrines in Tokushima Prefecture]] [[Category:History of Anan]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Anan]] [[Category:Completion tier 2]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:Todoroki Shrine (Anan)]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:pages which might possibly be incomplete but are most likely complete]] }} [[sn:Todoroki Shrine (Anan)]] [[sn:odoroki Shrine (Anan)]] [[ja:轟神社 (阿南市)]] [[en:Todoroki Shrine (Anan)]] {{DEFAULTSORT:Todoroki Shrine (Anan)}}

revision.text:
{{神社 | 名称 = 轟神社 | 画像 = [[File:Todoroki-shrine.jpg|250px]] | 所在地 = [[徳島県]][[阿南市]][[新野町 (阿南市)|新野町]]宮ノ北41 | 位置 = {{Coord|33|50|51.2|N|134|34|42.5|E|type:landmark_region:JP-36|display=inline,title}} | 祭神 = {{Ublist| [[シナツヒコ|級長津比古命]] | 級長津比女 }} | 社格 = | 創建 = [[814年]]（[[弘仁]]元年） | 本殿 = | 別名 = | 例祭 = | 神事 = | 地図 = {{Location map|Japan Tokushima Prefecture|label=轟神社|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=20|float=center|border=none|width=200|caption=|relief=1}} }} '''轟神社'''（とどろきじんじゃ）は、[[徳島県]][[阿南市]][[新野町]]にある[[神社]]である。
== 歴史 == [[814年]]（[[弘仁]]元年）に[[大和国]]の[[龍田神社]]の分霊を勧請して創建したと伝わる。祭神は龍田風神と呼ばれ、農家や航海業者の信仰が厚い神である<ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=https://www.city.anan.tokushima.jp/docs/2010120800440/|title=轟神社|publisher=阿南市|accessdate=2021-04-23}}</ref>。 <gallery widths=200 heights=140> Todoroki-shrine front.jpg|境内から参道 </gallery>
== 祭神 == * [[シナツヒコ|級長津比古命]] * 級長津比女
== 新野のクスの群生 == 境内には樹齢700余年といわれる大樟が群生しており、徳島県の天然記念物にも指定されている。大樟の根元に白蛇2匹が棲み、時にふれ轟明神の使者として境内に現れ、これを見た者には幸福が訪れるという伝説がある<ref>{{Cite web|和書|url=https://www.anan-kankou.jp/docs/2016120800022/|title=轟神社|publisher=阿南市観光協会|accessdate=2021-04-23|url-status=dead|url-status-date=2024-09-19}}</ref>。
<gallery> Todoroki-shrine 3.jpg Aratano-kusu-no-gunsei 4.jpg Aratano-kusu-no-gunsei 3.jpg Aratano-kusu-no-gunsei.jpg Todoroki-shrine 4.jpg Aratano-kusu-no-gunsei 2.jpg </gallery>
== 交通 == * [[四国旅客鉄道|JR]][[牟岐線]]「[[新野駅 (徳島県)|新野駅]]」より徒歩で約30分。
== 脚注 == <references />
== 外部リンク == * [https://www.city.anan.tokushima.jp/docs/2010120800440/ 轟神社] - 阿南市
{{shinto-stub}}
{{DEFAULTSORT:ととろきしんしや}} [[category:徳島県の神社]] [[Category:阿南市の歴史]] [[Category:阿南市の建築物]]

The enshrined deity, referred to as the Tatsuta Wind God, has long been venerated by farmers and maritime workers.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.city.anan.tokushima.jp/docs/2010120800440/|title=Todoroki Shrine|publisher=Anan City|accessdate=2021-04-23}}</ref>
<gallery widths=200 heights=140> Todoroki-shrine front.jpg|Pathway from the shrine precincts </gallery>
== Deities == * [[Shinatsuhiko|級長津比古命]] * 級長津比女
== Aratano's Camphor Tree Grove == The shrine grounds feature a grove of camphor trees estimated to be over 700 years old. This grove is designated as a Natural Monument of Tokushima Prefecture. According to legend, two white snakes inhabit the roots of the largest tree. Occasionally appearing as messengers of Todoroki Myōjin, those who witness the snakes are said to receive good fortune.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.anan-kankou.jp/docs/2016120800022/|title=Todoroki Shrine|publisher=Anan City Tourism Association|accessdate=2021-04-23|url-status=dead|url-status-date=2024-09-19}}</ref>
<gallery> Todoroki-shrine 3.jpg Aratano-kusu-no-gunsei 4.jpg Aratano-kusu-no-gunsei 3.jpg Aratano-kusu-no-gunsei.jpg Todoroki-shrine 4.jpg Aratano-kusu-no-gunsei 2.jpg </gallery>
== Access == * Approximately 30 minutes on foot from [[Shikoku Railway Company|JR]] [[Mugi Line]]'s {{ill|Aratano Station|ja|新野駅 (徳島県)|qq=draft|qq=draft}}.
== References == <references />
== External Links == * [https://www.city.anan.tokushima.jp/docs/2010120800440/ Todoroki Shrine] - Anan City

revision.text:
{{Shrine | name = Todoroki Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = [[File:Todoroki-shrine.jpg|250px]] | location = Miyano-kita 41, Aratano-chō, [[Anan]], [[Tokushima Prefecture]] | coordinates = {{Coord|33|50|51.2|N|134|34|42.5|E|type:landmark_region:JP-36|display=inline,title}} | deity = {{Ublist|[[Shinatsuhiko|級長津比古命]]|級長津比女}} | Shrine Rank = | Foundation = [[814]] (Kōnin 1) | Main hall = | alternate_name = | Annual festival = | Rituals = | Map = {{location map|Japan Tokushima Prefecture|label=Todoroki Shrine|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=20|float=center|border=none|width=200|caption=|relief=1}} }} '''Todoroki Shrine''' (轟神社, Todoroki Jinja) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in [[Aratano-chō]], [[Anan]], [[Tokushima Prefecture]].
== History == The shrine is believed to have been founded in [[814]] (Kōnin 1) by enshrining a divided spirit from {{ill|Tatsuta Taisha|lt=Tatsuta Taisha|lt=Tatsuta Shrine|ja|龍田神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tatsuta Shrine|qq=}} in [[:en:Yamato Province|Yamato Province]]. The enshrined deity, referred to as the Tatsuta Wind God, has long been venerated by farmers and maritime workers.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.city.anan.tokushima.jp/docs/2010120800440/|title=Todoroki Shrine|publisher=Anan City|accessdate=2021-04-23}}</ref>
<gallery widths=200 heights=140> Todoroki-shrine front.jpg|Pathway from the shrine precincts </gallery>
== Deities == * [[Shinatsuhiko|級長津比古命]] * 級長津比女
== Aratano's Camphor Tree Grove == The shrine grounds feature a grove of camphor trees estimated to be over 700 years old. This grove is designated as a Natural Monument of Tokushima Prefecture. According to legend, two white snakes inhabit the roots of the largest tree. Occasionally appearing as messengers of Todoroki Myōjin, those who witness the snakes are said to receive good fortune.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.anan-kankou.jp/docs/2016120800022/|title=Todoroki Shrine|publisher=Anan City Tourism Association|accessdate=2021-04-23|url-status=dead|url-status-date=2024-09-19}}</ref>
<gallery> Todoroki-shrine 3.jpg Aratano-kusu-no-gunsei 4.jpg Aratano-kusu-no-gunsei 3.jpg Aratano-kusu-no-gunsei.jpg Todoroki-shrine 4.jpg Aratano-kusu-no-gunsei 2.jpg </gallery>
== Access == * Approximately 30 minutes on foot from [[Shikoku Railway Company|JR]] [[Mugi Line]]'s [[:en:Aratano Station|Aratano Station]].
== References == <references />
== External Links == * [https://www.city.anan.tokushima.jp/docs/2010120800440/ Todoroki Shrine] - Anan City
{{shinto-stub}}
{{translated page|ja|轟神社 (阿南市)|version=101919518|comment=Imported full ja history}}

{{Shrine | name = Todoroki Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = [[File:Todoroki-shrine.jpg|250px]] | location = Miyano-kita 41, Aratano-chō, [[Anan]], [[Tokushima Prefecture]] | coordinates = {{Coord|33|50|51.2|N|134|34|42.5|E|type:landmark_region:JP-36|display=inline,title}} | deity = {{Ublist|[[Shinatsuhiko|級長津比古命]]|級長津比女}} | Shrine Rank = | Foundation = [[814]] (Kōnin 1) | Main hall = | alternate_name = | Annual festival = | Rituals = | Map = {{location map|Japan Tokushima Prefecture|label=Todoroki Shrine|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=20|float=center|border=none|width=200|caption=|relief=1}} }} '''Todoroki Shrine''' (轟神社, Todoroki Jinja) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in [[Aratano-chō]], [[Anan]], [[Tokushima Prefecture]].
== History == The shrine is believed to have been founded in [[814]] (Kōnin 1) by enshrining a divided spirit from {{ill|Tatsuta Taisha|lt=Tatsuta Taisha|lt=Tatsuta Shrine|ja|龍田神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tatsuta Shrine|qq=}} in [[:en:Yamato Province|Yamato Province]]. The enshrined deity, referred to as the Tatsuta Wind God, has long been venerated by farmers and maritime workers.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.city.anan.tokushima.jp/docs/2010120800440/|title=Todoroki Shrine|publisher=Anan City|accessdate=2021-04-23}}</ref>
<gallery widths=200 heights=140> Todoroki-shrine front.jpg|Pathway from the shrine precincts </gallery>
== Deities == * [[Shinatsuhiko|級長津比古命]] * 級長津比女
== Aratano's Camphor Tree Grove == The shrine grounds feature a grove of camphor trees estimated to be over 700 years old. This grove is designated as a Natural Monument of Tokushima Prefecture. According to legend, two white snakes inhabit the roots of the largest tree. Occasionally appearing as messengers of Todoroki Myōjin, those who witness the snakes are said to receive good fortune.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.anan-kankou.jp/docs/2016120800022/|title=Todoroki Shrine|publisher=Anan City Tourism Association|accessdate=2021-04-23|url-status=dead|url-status-date=2024-09-19}}</ref>
<gallery> Todoroki-shrine 3.jpg Aratano-kusu-no-gunsei 4.jpg Aratano-kusu-no-gunsei 3.jpg Aratano-kusu-no-gunsei.jpg Todoroki-shrine 4.jpg Aratano-kusu-no-gunsei 2.jpg </gallery>
== Access == * Approximately 30 minutes on foot from [[Shikoku Railway Company|JR]] [[Mugi Line]]'s [[:en:Aratano Station|Aratano Station]].
== References == <references />
== External Links == * [https://www.city.anan.tokushima.jp/docs/2010120800440/ Todoroki Shrine] - Anan City

revision.text:
{{Shrine | name = Todoroki Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = [[File:Todoroki-shrine.jpg|250px]] | location = Miyano-kita 41, Aratano-chō, [[:en:Anan|Anan]], [[Tokushima Prefecture]] | coordinates = {{Coord|33|50|51.2|N|134|34|42.5|E|type:landmark_region:JP-36|display=inline,title}} | deity = {{Ublist|[[Shinatsuhiko|級長津比古命]]|級長津比女}} | Shrine Rank = | Foundation = [[:en:814|814]] (Kōnin 1) | Main hall = | alternate_name = | Annual festival = | Rituals = | Map = {{location map|Japan Tokushima Prefecture|label=Todoroki Shrine|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=20|float=center|border=none|width=200|caption=|relief=1}} }} '''Todoroki Shrine''' (轟神社, Todoroki Jinja) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in [[Aratano-chō]], [[:en:Anan|Anan]], [[Tokushima Prefecture]].
== History == The shrine is believed to have been founded in [[:en:814|814]] (Kōnin 1) by enshrining a divided spirit from {{ill|Tatsuta Taisha|lt=Tatsuta Taisha|lt=Tatsuta Shrine|ja|龍田神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tatsuta Shrine|qq=}} in [[:en:Yamato Province|Yamato Province]]. The enshrined deity, referred to as the Tatsuta Wind God, has long been venerated by farmers and maritime workers.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.city.anan.tokushima.jp/docs/2010120800440/|title=Todoroki Shrine|publisher=Anan City|accessdate=2021-04-23}}</ref>
<gallery widths=200 heights=140> Todoroki-shrine front.jpg|Pathway from the shrine precincts </gallery>
== Deities == * [[Shinatsuhiko|級長津比古命]] * 級長津比女
== Aratano's Camphor Tree Grove == The shrine grounds feature a grove of camphor trees estimated to be over 700 years old. This grove is designated as a Natural Monument of Tokushima Prefecture. According to legend, two white snakes inhabit the roots of the largest tree. Occasionally appearing as messengers of Todoroki Myōjin, those who witness the snakes are said to receive good fortune.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.anan-kankou.jp/docs/2016120800022/|title=Todoroki Shrine|publisher=Anan City Tourism Association|accessdate=2021-04-23|url-status=dead|url-status-date=2024-09-19}}</ref>
<gallery> Todoroki-shrine 3.jpg Aratano-kusu-no-gunsei 4.jpg Aratano-kusu-no-gunsei 3.jpg Aratano-kusu-no-gunsei.jpg Todoroki-shrine 4.jpg Aratano-kusu-no-gunsei 2.jpg </gallery>
== Access == * Approximately 30 minutes on foot from [[:en:Shikoku Railway Company|JR]] [[:en:Mugi Line|Mugi Line]]'s [[:en:Aratano Station|Aratano Station]].
== References == <references />
== External Links == * [https://www.city.anan.tokushima.jp/docs/2010120800440/ Todoroki Shrine] - Anan City
{{shinto-stub}}
{{translated page|ja|轟神社 (阿南市)|version=101919518|comment=Imported full ja history}}

[[Category:Completion tier 2]]
}}

<!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis-->

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q106852690]] Wikidata name: Todoroki-jinja [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:58, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | name = Todoroki Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = File:Todoroki-shrine.jpg | location = Miyano-kita 41, Aratano-chō, [[:en:Anan|Anan]], [[:en:Tokushima Prefecture|Tokushima Prefecture]] | coordinates = {{Coord|33.84755555555556|N|134.57847222222222|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} | deity = {{Ublist|[[:en:Shinatsuhiko|級長津比古命]]|級長津比女}} | Shrine Rank = | Foundation = [[:en:814|814]] (Kōnin 1) | Main hall = | alternate_name = | Annual festival = | Rituals = | Map = {{location map|Japan Tokushima Prefecture|label=Todoroki Shrine|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=20|float=center|border=none|width=200|caption=|relief=1}} | location = {{ill|Anan|qid=Q485583}} }} '''Todoroki Shrine''' (轟神社, Todoroki Jinja) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in [[Aratano-chō]], [[:en:Anan|Anan]], [[:en:Tokushima Prefecture|Tokushima Prefecture]].
== History == The shrine is believed to have been founded in [[:en:814|814]] (Kōnin 1) by enshrining a divided spirit from {{ill|Tatsuta Taisha|lt=Tatsuta Taisha|lt=Tatsuta Shrine|ja|龍田神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tatsuta Shrine|qq=}} in [[:en:Yamato Province|Yamato Province]]. The enshrined deity, referred to as the Tatsuta Wind God, has long been venerated by farmers and maritime workers.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.city.anan.tokushima.jp/docs/2010120800440/|title=Todoroki Shrine|publisher=Anan City|accessdate=2021-04-23}}</ref>
<gallery widths=200 heights=140> Todoroki-shrine front.jpg|Pathway from the shrine precincts </gallery>
== Deities == * [[:en:Shinatsuhiko|級長津比古命]] * 級長津比女
== Aratano's Camphor Tree Grove == The shrine grounds feature a grove of camphor trees estimated to be over 700 years old. This grove is designated as a Natural Monument of Tokushima Prefecture. According to legend, two white snakes inhabit the roots of the largest tree. Occasionally appearing as messengers of Todoroki Myōjin, those who witness the snakes are said to receive good fortune.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.anan-kankou.jp/docs/2016120800022/|title=Todoroki Shrine|publisher=Anan City Tourism Association|accessdate=2021-04-23|url-status=dead|url-status-date=2024-09-19}}</ref>
<gallery> Todoroki-shrine 3.jpg Aratano-kusu-no-gunsei 4.jpg Aratano-kusu-no-gunsei 3.jpg Aratano-kusu-no-gunsei.jpg Todoroki-shrine 4.jpg Aratano-kusu-no-gunsei 2.jpg </gallery>
== Access == * Approximately 30 minutes on foot from [[:en:Shikoku Railway Company|JR]] [[:en:Mugi Line|Mugi Line]]'s [[:en:Aratano Station|Aratano Station]].
== References == <references />
== External Links == * [https://www.city.anan.tokushima.jp/docs/2010120800440/ Todoroki Shrine] - Anan City

The enshrined deity, referred to as the Tatsuta Wind God, has long been venerated by farmers and maritime workers.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.city.anan.tokushima.jp/docs/2010120800440/|title=Todoroki Shrine|publisher=Anan City|accessdate=2021-04-23}}</ref>
<gallery widths=200 heights=140> Todoroki-shrine front.jpg|Pathway from the shrine precincts </gallery>
== Deities == * [[:en:Shinatsuhiko|級長津比古命]] * 級長津比女
== Aratano's Camphor Tree Grove == The shrine grounds feature a grove of camphor trees estimated to be over 700 years old. This grove is designated as a Natural Monument of Tokushima Prefecture. According to legend, two white snakes inhabit the roots of the largest tree. Occasionally appearing as messengers of Todoroki Myōjin, those who witness the snakes are said to receive good fortune.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.anan-kankou.jp/docs/2016120800022/|title=Todoroki Shrine|publisher=Anan City Tourism Association|accessdate=2021-04-23|url-status=dead|url-status-date=2024-09-19}}</ref>
<gallery> Todoroki-shrine 3.jpg Aratano-kusu-no-gunsei 4.jpg Aratano-kusu-no-gunsei 3.jpg Aratano-kusu-no-gunsei.jpg Todoroki-shrine 4.jpg Aratano-kusu-no-gunsei 2.jpg </gallery>
== Access == * Approximately 30 minutes on foot from [[:en:Shikoku Railway Company|JR]] [[:en:Mugi Line|Mugi Line]]'s [[:en:Aratano Station|Aratano Station]].
== References == <references />
== External Links == * [https://www.city.anan.tokushima.jp/docs/2010120800440/ Todoroki Shrine] - Anan City

The enshrined deity, referred to as the Tatsuta Wind God, has long been venerated by farmers and maritime workers.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.city.anan.tokushima.jp/docs/2010120800440/|title=Todoroki Shrine|publisher=Anan City|accessdate=2021-04-23}}</ref>
<gallery widths=200 heights=140> Todoroki-shrine front.jpg|Pathway from the shrine precincts </gallery>
== Deities == * [[:en:Shinatsuhiko|級長津比古命]] * 級長津比女
== Aratano's Camphor Tree Grove == The shrine grounds feature a grove of camphor trees estimated to be over 700 years old. This grove is designated as a Natural Monument of Tokushima Prefecture. According to legend, two white snakes inhabit the roots of the largest tree. Occasionally appearing as messengers of Todoroki Myōjin, those who witness the snakes are said to receive good fortune.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.anan-kankou.jp/docs/2016120800022/|title=Todoroki Shrine|publisher=Anan City Tourism Association|accessdate=2021-04-23|url-status=dead|url-status-date=2024-09-19}}</ref>
<gallery> Todoroki-shrine 3.jpg Aratano-kusu-no-gunsei 4.jpg Aratano-kusu-no-gunsei 3.jpg Aratano-kusu-no-gunsei.jpg Todoroki-shrine 4.jpg Aratano-kusu-no-gunsei 2.jpg </gallery>
== Access == * Approximately 30 minutes on foot from [[:en:Shikoku Railway Company|JR]] [[:en:Mugi Line|Mugi Line]]'s [[:en:Aratano Station|Aratano Station]].
== References == <references />
== External Links == * [https://www.city.anan.tokushima.jp/docs/2010120800440/ Todoroki Shrine] - Anan City

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:轟神社 (阿南市)]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q106852690]] Wikidata name: Todoroki-jinja [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:58, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | name = Todoroki Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = File:Todoroki-shrine.jpg | location = Miyano-kita 41, Aratano-chō, [[:en:Anan|Anan]], [[:en:Tokushima Prefecture|Tokushima Prefecture]] | coordinates = {{Coord|33.84755555555556|N|134.57847222222222|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} | deity = {{Ublist|[[:en:Shinatsuhiko|級長津比古命]]|級長津比女}} | Shrine Rank = | Foundation = [[:en:814|814]] (Kōnin 1) | Main hall = | alternate_name = | Annual festival = | Rituals = | Map = {{location map|Japan Tokushima Prefecture|label=Todoroki Shrine|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=20|float=center|border=none|width=200|caption=|relief=1}} | location = {{ill|Anan|WD=Q485583}} }} '''Todoroki Shrine''' (轟神社, Todoroki Jinja) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in [[Aratano-chō]], [[:en:Anan|Anan]], [[:en:Tokushima Prefecture|Tokushima Prefecture]].
== History == The shrine is believed to have been founded in [[:en:814|814]] (Kōnin 1) by enshrining a divided spirit from {{ill|Tatsuta Taisha|lt=Tatsuta Taisha|lt=Tatsuta Shrine|ja|龍田神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tatsuta Shrine|qq=}} in [[:en:Yamato Province|Yamato Province]]. The enshrined deity, referred to as the Tatsuta Wind God, has long been venerated by farmers and maritime workers.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.city.anan.tokushima.jp/docs/2010120800440/|title=Todoroki Shrine|publisher=Anan City|accessdate=2021-04-23}}</ref>
<gallery widths=200 heights=140> Todoroki-shrine front.jpg|Pathway from the shrine precincts </gallery>
== Deities == * [[:en:Shinatsuhiko|級長津比古命]] * 級長津比女
== Aratano's Camphor Tree Grove == The shrine grounds feature a grove of camphor trees estimated to be over 700 years old. This grove is designated as a Natural Monument of Tokushima Prefecture. According to legend, two white snakes inhabit the roots of the largest tree. Occasionally appearing as messengers of Todoroki Myōjin, those who witness the snakes are said to receive good fortune.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.anan-kankou.jp/docs/2016120800022/|title=Todoroki Shrine|publisher=Anan City Tourism Association|accessdate=2021-04-23|url-status=dead|url-status-date=2024-09-19}}</ref>
<gallery> Todoroki-shrine 3.jpg Aratano-kusu-no-gunsei 4.jpg Aratano-kusu-no-gunsei 3.jpg Aratano-kusu-no-gunsei.jpg Todoroki-shrine 4.jpg Aratano-kusu-no-gunsei 2.jpg </gallery>
== Access == * Approximately 30 minutes on foot from [[:en:Shikoku Railway Company|JR]] [[:en:Mugi Line|Mugi Line]]'s [[:en:Aratano Station|Aratano Station]].
== References == <references />
== External Links == * [https://www.city.anan.tokushima.jp/docs/2010120800440/ Todoroki Shrine] - Anan City

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:轟神社 (阿南市)]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:轟神社 (阿南市)]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:轟神社 (阿南市)]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q106852690]] Wikidata name: Todoroki-jinja [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:58, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | name = Todoroki Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = File:Todoroki-shrine.jpg | location = Miyano-kita 41, Aratano-chō, [[:en:Anan|Anan]], [[:en:Tokushima Prefecture|Tokushima Prefecture]] | coordinates = {{Coord|33.84755555555556|N|134.57847222222222|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} | deity = {{Ublist|[[:en:Shinatsuhiko|級長津比古命]]|級長津比女}} | Shrine Rank = | Foundation = [[:en:814|814]] (Kōnin 1) | Main hall = | alternate_name = | Annual festival = | Rituals = | Map = {{location map|Japan Tokushima Prefecture|label=Todoroki Shrine|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=20|float=center|border=none|width=200|caption=|relief=1}} | location = {{ill|Anan|WD=Q485583}} }} '''Todoroki Shrine''' (轟神社, Todoroki Jinja) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] located in [[Aratano-chō]], [[:en:Anan|Anan]], [[:en:Tokushima Prefecture|Tokushima Prefecture]].
== History == The shrine is believed to have been founded in [[:en:814|814]] (Kōnin 1) by enshrining a divided spirit from {{ill|Tatsuta Taisha|lt=Tatsuta Taisha|lt=Tatsuta Shrine|ja|龍田神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tatsuta Shrine|qq=}} in [[:en:Yamato Province|Yamato Province]]. The enshrined deity, referred to as the Tatsuta Wind God, has long been venerated by farmers and maritime workers.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.city.anan.tokushima.jp/docs/2010120800440/|title=Todoroki Shrine|publisher=Anan City|accessdate=2021-04-23}}</ref>
<gallery widths=200 heights=140> Todoroki-shrine front.jpg|Pathway from the shrine precincts </gallery>
== Deities == * [[:en:Shinatsuhiko|級長津比古命]] * 級長津比女
== Aratano's Camphor Tree Grove == The shrine grounds feature a grove of camphor trees estimated to be over 700 years old. This grove is designated as a Natural Monument of Tokushima Prefecture. According to legend, two white snakes inhabit the roots of the largest tree. Occasionally appearing as messengers of Todoroki Myōjin, those who witness the snakes are said to receive good fortune.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.anan-kankou.jp/docs/2016120800022/|title=Todoroki Shrine|publisher=Anan City Tourism Association|accessdate=2021-04-23|url-status=dead|url-status-date=2024-09-19}}</ref>
<gallery> Todoroki-shrine 3.jpg Aratano-kusu-no-gunsei 4.jpg Aratano-kusu-no-gunsei 3.jpg Aratano-kusu-no-gunsei.jpg Todoroki-shrine 4.jpg Aratano-kusu-no-gunsei 2.jpg </gallery>
== Access == * Approximately 30 minutes on foot from [[:en:Shikoku Railway Company|JR]] [[:en:Mugi Line|Mugi Line]]'s [[:en:Aratano Station|Aratano Station]].
== References == <references />
== External Links == * [https://www.city.anan.tokushima.jp/docs/2010120800440/ Todoroki Shrine] - Anan City

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:轟神社 (阿南市)]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:轟神社 (阿南市)]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:轟神社 (阿南市)]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q106852690]] Wikidata name: Todoroki-jinja [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:58, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | name = Todoroki Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = File:Todoroki-shrine.jpg | location = Miyano-kita 41, Aratano-chō, {{ill|Anan|en|Anan|WD=Q251784|lt=Anan}}, {{ill|Tokushima Prefecture|en|Tokushima Prefecture|WD=Q160734|lt=Tokushima Prefecture}} | coordinates = {{Coord|33.84755555555556|N|134.57847222222222|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} | deity = {{Ublist|{{ill|Shinatsuhiko|en|Shinatsuhiko|WD=Q1073925|lt=級長津比古命}}|級長津比女}} | Shrine Rank = | Foundation = {{ill|814|en|814|WD=Q23447|lt=814}} (Kōnin 1) | Main hall = | alternate_name = | Annual festival = | Rituals = | Map = {{location map|Japan Tokushima Prefecture|label=Todoroki Shrine|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=20|float=center|border=none|width=200|caption=|relief=1}} | location = {{ill|Anan|WD=Q485583}} }} '''Todoroki Shrine''' (轟神社, Todoroki Jinja) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|WD=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrine}} located in [[Aratano-chō]], {{ill|Anan|en|Anan|WD=Q251784|lt=Anan}}, {{ill|Tokushima Prefecture|en|Tokushima Prefecture|WD=Q160734|lt=Tokushima Prefecture}}.
== History == The shrine is believed to have been founded in {{ill|814|en|814|WD=Q23447|lt=814}} (Kōnin 1) by enshrining a divided spirit from {{ill|Tatsuta Taisha|lt=Tatsuta Taisha|lt=Tatsuta Shrine|ja|龍田神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tatsuta Shrine|qq=}} in {{ill|Yamato Province|en|Yamato Province|WD=Q907495|lt=Yamato Province}}. The enshrined deity, referred to as the Tatsuta Wind God, has long been venerated by farmers and maritime workers.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.city.anan.tokushima.jp/docs/2010120800440/|title=Todoroki Shrine|publisher=Anan City|accessdate=2021-04-23}}</ref>
<gallery widths=200 heights=140> Todoroki-shrine front.jpg|Pathway from the shrine precincts </gallery>
== Deities == * {{ill|Shinatsuhiko|en|Shinatsuhiko|WD=Q1073925|lt=級長津比古命}} * 級長津比女
== Aratano's Camphor Tree Grove == The shrine grounds feature a grove of camphor trees estimated to be over 700 years old. This grove is designated as a Natural Monument of Tokushima Prefecture. According to legend, two white snakes inhabit the roots of the largest tree. Occasionally appearing as messengers of Todoroki Myōjin, those who witness the snakes are said to receive good fortune.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.anan-kankou.jp/docs/2016120800022/|title=Todoroki Shrine|publisher=Anan City Tourism Association|accessdate=2021-04-23|url-status=dead|url-status-date=2024-09-19}}</ref>
<gallery> Todoroki-shrine 3.jpg Aratano-kusu-no-gunsei 4.jpg Aratano-kusu-no-gunsei 3.jpg Aratano-kusu-no-gunsei.jpg Todoroki-shrine 4.jpg Aratano-kusu-no-gunsei 2.jpg </gallery>
== Access == * Approximately 30 minutes on foot from {{ill|Shikoku Railway Company|en|Shikoku Railway Company|WD=Q496531|lt=JR}} {{ill|Mugi Line|en|Mugi Line|WD=Q860478|lt=Mugi Line}}'s {{ill|Aratano Station|en|Aratano Station|WD=Q4784417|lt=Aratano Station}}.
== References == <references />
== External Links == * [https://www.city.anan.tokushima.jp/docs/2010120800440/ Todoroki Shrine] - Anan City

The enshrined deity, referred to as the Tatsuta Wind God, has long been venerated by farmers and maritime workers.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.city.anan.tokushima.jp/docs/2010120800440/|title=Todoroki Shrine|publisher=Anan City|accessdate=2021-04-23}}</ref>
<gallery widths=200 heights=140> Todoroki-shrine front.jpg|Pathway from the shrine precincts </gallery>
== Deities == * {{ill|Shinatsuhiko|en|Shinatsuhiko|WD=Q1073925|lt=級長津比古命|1=Shinatsuhiko}} * 級長津比女
== Aratano's Camphor Tree Grove == The shrine grounds feature a grove of camphor trees estimated to be over 700 years old. This grove is designated as a Natural Monument of Tokushima Prefecture. According to legend, two white snakes inhabit the roots of the largest tree. Occasionally appearing as messengers of Todoroki Myōjin, those who witness the snakes are said to receive good fortune.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.anan-kankou.jp/docs/2016120800022/|title=Todoroki Shrine|publisher=Anan City Tourism Association|accessdate=2021-04-23|url-status=dead|url-status-date=2024-09-19}}</ref>
<gallery> Todoroki-shrine 3.jpg Aratano-kusu-no-gunsei 4.jpg Aratano-kusu-no-gunsei 3.jpg Aratano-kusu-no-gunsei.jpg Todoroki-shrine 4.jpg Aratano-kusu-no-gunsei 2.jpg </gallery>
== Access == * Approximately 30 minutes on foot from {{ill|Shikoku Railway Company|en|Shikoku Railway Company|WD=Q496531|lt=JR|1=Shikoku Railway Company}} {{ill|Mugi Line|en|Mugi Line|WD=Q860478|lt=Mugi Line|1=Mugi Line}}'s {{ill|Aratano Station|en|Aratano Station|WD=Q4784417|lt=Aratano Station|1=Aratano Station}}.
== References == <references />
== External Links == * [https://www.city.anan.tokushima.jp/docs/2010120800440/ Todoroki Shrine] - Anan City
